description: Lead workbench KPI: lead counts by lifecycle status (new/contacted/qualified/converted/lost) plus the overall total, tenant-scoped. Feeds the metric-strip on the crm_lead_workbench console.
fromSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm_lead_status = 'new') AS new_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm_lead_status = 'contacted') AS contacted_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm_lead_status = 'qualified') AS qualified_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm_lead_status = 'converted') AS converted_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm_lead_status = 'lost') AS lost_count FROM mt_crm_lead WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId}
